daily_summary.headline: Exciting Aurora and Multiple Launches Await

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A strong geomagnetic storm (G2) is predicted with a Kp index of 6.33, offering great aurora viewing opportunities for observers down to 55° latitude.
top_events.action: Check local weather and plan for aurora viewing.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 Block 5 will launch the Starlink Group 10-33, a batch of 29 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for launch coverage.

top_events.title: Soyuz 2.1b/Fregat-M Launch
top_events.description: Soyuz 2.1b/Fregat-M will launch 16 Rassvet-3 satellites for broadband internet access in Russia.

alerts.title: Strong Aurora Alert
alerts.message: A strong geomagnetic storm (G2) with a Kp index of 6.33 is expected, providing excellent aurora viewing opportunities for observers down to 55° latitude.
alerts.action_required: Check local weather conditions and plan for aurora viewing, especially if you're located above 55° latitude.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
